title: Vertical cooldown and regression phase
summary: Lane 3 should pause destination growth for one wave and spend it on readability cleanup plus regression protection across the new benchmark spaces.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the vertical cooldown cleanup handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The newest beach and treeline spaces are near their comfortable density ceiling.

execution_order.goal: Implement one small readability or recovery cleanup in a current vertical benchmark space.
execution_order.why_now: The best vertical move right now is protection, not more landmark growth.
The cleanup should protect feel without silently broadening scope.
Current benchmark spaces should become safer to extend later.
Guardrails are higher value than another destination right now.
The current traversal family should be safer and clearer after this wave.

main_275_focus.problem: The current hand-back from the crest brow into open fell still depends on a tight first catch point. Slightly late or shallow descents can skip the intended sheltered return feel even though the ideal proof path works.
preferred_shape: Prefer widening lee-pocket-fell-return slightly toward the incoming brow side.
If needed, use only a tiny companion nudge to lee-pocket-lee-rest.
main_275_focus.verification_note: Keep one real-start seeded browser proof from the normal treeline start instead of relying only on the temporary start override.

main_276_focus.problem: The current runtime smoke only proves a broad right-hand stabilization band. A future treeline geometry pass could bypass the intended sheltered hand-back while still satisfying that generic settle window.
preferred_shape: Add a treeline-specific smoke helper that derives the sheltered return band from the authored return platforms.
Use that helper in one dedicated loop assertion before the route opens fully into lichen-fell.
avoid: new geometry unless the proof exposes a real mismatch
main_276_focus.verification_note: Prefer deterministic runtime coverage over fresh browser stepping while the unrelated nursery runtime error is still breaking render_game_to_text during stepped browser checks.

guardrails: Do not add another destination or route family in this wave.
Prefer spacing, recoverability, and regression protection over new content.
